description: 두산 Back reach Cylinder Position Sensor는 백리치 실린더의 위치를 실시간으로 정확히 감지하여 고신뢰성·내구성을 제공하고, 간편한 설치와 명확한 신호 출력으로 시스템 제어를 효율화함.
ARMGC Motor 수분재기 Current Board는 수분 재배 시스템의 모터 전류를 정밀하게 제어·모니터링하여 안정적인 물 공급을 구현함.
Y/T Radiator는 알루미늄 합금으로 제작된 고효율 차량용 냉각 라디에이터로, 경량·내식성·다중 코어 설계가 특징이며 열 방출 성능이 뛰어남.
ELEVATOR ACTUATOR는 고출력·고정밀 구동으로 승강기 문·속도·위치 제어를 신속하고 안전하게 수행하여 에너지 효율과 내구성을 동시에 제공함.
과속 릴레이는 회전기계·터빈·펌프 등에서 속도가 설정값을 초과하면 전원을 차단하거나 경보를 발생시켜 기계 손상을 방지함과 동시에 고속 회전 감지를 위한 신뢰성 높은 전자식 보호 기능을 제공함.
E/H 체인은 전기·유압 구동 시스템에서 동력을 전달하기 위해 사용되며, 고강도 스틸 소재와 부식 방지 코팅으로 내구성이 뛰어나고, 체인 길이·피치·강도 옵션이 다양해 맞춤형 설계가 가능함.
IGBT 모듈+드라이브는 고전압·고전류 전력 변환을 효율적으로 수행하고, 빠른 스위칭 속도와 뛰어난 내열·내전압 특성을 갖추어 전동기 구동·인버터 시스템 등에 활용됨.
Festoon System Towing Trolley는 전선·케이블을 손상 없이 안전하게 이동·배치할 수 있도록 설계된 이동식 트롤리로, 견고한 프레임과 회전식 바퀴, 조절 가능한 고정 장치 등을 갖추어 대형 설비 현장에서 효율적인 케이블 운반을 가능하게 함.
STS/ARMGC LCL DRIVE COOLING FAN은 저전압·저전류 구동 장치의 과열을 방지하기 위해 설계된 고효율·저소음 냉각 팬으로, 컴팩트한 구조와 내구성 높은 재질을 갖추고 있음.
T/L/S 브레이크 모터는 고정밀 위치 제어와 빠른 정지 기능을 제공하며, 고토크·고속·저소음의 특성을 동시에 갖추어 자동화 설비·로봇 시스템 등에서 사용됨.
EGR 냉각기는 배기 가스를 냉각해 연소 온도를 낮추고 NOx 배출을 감소시키며, 고내열·고내식성 재질과 효율적인 열교환 구조를 갖춤.
STS 트롤리 와이어 로프(ZPMC)는 컨테이너 크레인의 트롤리 구동 및 중량 하역을 위해 고강도·내식성·저신장 특성을 갖춘 고품질 로프로, 장기간 안정적인 운용이 가능함.
Dometic 에어컨은 차량·보트·캠핑카 등 이동식 공간에 최적화된 냉방·제습 기능을 제공하며, 저전력 소비와 자동 온도 조절, 소음 최소화, 내구성 높은 설계가 특징임.
STS(두산) PCR/SCR DRIVE는 산업용 모터의 속도와 토크를 정밀하게 제어하면서 고효율·저왜곡·내구성·다중 보호 기능을 제공함.
유압 기어 휠 펌프는 유압 시스템에 고압 유체를 연속적으로 공급하며, 소형·경량·고효율·내구성·저소음·간단한 구조가 특징임.
ISU Drive Fan은 전동기·인버터 등 전자장비의 과열을 방지하기 위해 고효율·저소음 설계와 내열·방진 기능을 갖춘 냉각용 구동 팬임.
스프링 로드 브레이크 실린더는 차량·기계의 유압식 제동 시스템에 적용되어 브레이크 압력을 자동으로 유지·보강함으로써 급제동 시 빠른 반응과 고장 시 자동 제동 기능을 제공함.
Truck Display는 이동 중인 트럭에 설치해 실시간 광고·정보 제공을 가능하게 하며, 고해상도 화면, 방수·방진 설계, 원격 제어 및 콘텐츠 스케줄링 기능 등을 갖춤.
VSR 2용 PCB 보드(박스 미포함)로, 전원 공급·제어 회로를 일체화해 고신뢰성·소형화·납땜 편리성을 제공함.
CANopen I/O “THE PLANK”는 CANopen 기반의 모듈형 입출력 확장 장치로, 디지털·아날로그 I/O를 다수 제공하고 플러그‑인식 설계와 실시간 통신·진단 기능을 지원함.
IGBT AGDR 72C는 1200 V·72 A 등급의 고전압·고전류 IGBT 모듈로 전력 인버터·모터 구동·UPS 등에 사용되며, 저스위칭 손실·고온 동작·내단락 보호·소형 패키지·내구성 높은 반도체 구조 등의 특징을 가짐.
전차선 전동차용 캐터너리 트롤리 휠 어셈블리는 전선 위를 원활히 이동하도록 설계된 고강도 알루미늄 휠과 베어링으로 구성되어 전력 공급을 안정적으로 지원함.
ARMGC 트롤리 휠 어셈블리는 고하중을 견디는 내구성 있는 휠과 베어링으로 구성되어 부식 방지와 원활한 회전을 제공함으로써 물류·생산 현장의 트롤리 이동을 효율적으로 지원함.
TWISTLOCK DRIVE는 ISO 규격 컨테이너를 차량·선박 등에 신속하고 안전하게 고정하기 위한 회전식 잠금 장치로, 자동 잠금·해제 기능과 고강도 스틸 구조, 360도 회전 가능성을 갖추어 작업 효율과 안전성을 높임.
차량의 바퀴를 제동해 안전하게 정지시키는 역할을 하며, 고강도 디스크·캘리퍼·패드 등으로 구성돼 내구성이 뛰어나고 정밀한 제동력을 제공함.
STS TROLLEY BUFFER(두산)는 물류 트롤리의 충격을 효과적으로 흡수해 장비와 작업자를 보호하고, 고강도 강재와 방청 코팅으로 내구성을 확보하며, 간편 설치와 조절 가능한 디자인을 제공함.
C-54E-MC는 HDMI·SDI 입력 영상을 H.264/H.265 형식으로 실시간 인코딩해 IP 네트워크로 전송하고, PoE 전원 공급·4K·1080p 고해상도 지원·저지연·원격 관리 기능을 제공함.
R/S Joystick은 레이싱·시뮬레이션 게임 조작을 위해 설계된 고정밀 아날로그 스틱으로, 360도 회전과 가변 저항식 센서를 기반으로 한 정밀 입력, 인체공학적 그립 및 다중 프로그래머블 버튼을 제공함.

item_name: QC(ZPMC) LS Catenary On Hoist Wire Roller Assy
description: QC(ZPMC) LS Catenary On Hoist Wire Roller Assy는 크레인 호이스트에 사용되는 케이블 케테날을 지지·유도하여 마모를 최소화하고, 고강도·내식성 소재로 제작돼 장기간 안정적인 운용을 보장함.
Sany T/H 라디에이터는 엔진·유압 시스템의 과열을 방지하기 위해 열을 효율적으로 방출하도록 설계된 부품으로, 고효율 알루미늄 합금 구조와 내식성, 간편한 설치·교체가 특징임.
STS 스프레더 전원 공급 장치는 스프레더 장비에 안정적인 전력을 공급함으로써 작업 효율을 높이고, 고효율·저전압 손실, 과전압·과전류·단락 보호 기능, 컴팩트한 설계와 다중 전압 출력 옵션을 제공함.
5TH WHEEL HYDRAULIC CYLINDER, MAFI는 트레일러와 트럭을 연결하는 5th 휠을 전동식으로 상승·하강시켜 적재·하역을 용이하게 하며, 고하중 용량·빠른 작동 속도·내구성 있는 구조·간편한 설치·정비가 특징임.
절대값 인코더는 전원 차단 후에도 각도 정보를 유지하여 정확한 위치를 디지털 신호로 제공함으로써 고정밀 위치 제어와 재시작 시점 복구가 가능함.
Y/T Aor Compressor는 고압·고품질의 공기를 안정적으로 공급하도록 설계된 고효율·저소음 압축기로, 자동 온·압력 제어와 내구성 높은 부품을 갖추어 장시간 무리 없이 운전할 수 있음.
START MOTOR(M009T84079)는 SANY 장비에 공용으로 적용되는 고출력 시동 모터로, 빠른 시동과 높은 토크, 저전력 소모 및 내구성을 겸비함.
ARMGC Service Crane (NEW)는 항공기 정비 및 현장 작업 시 중량 부품을 안전하게 들어올리고 이동시킬 수 있도록 설계된 고하중 이동식 크레인으로, 전동식 제어와 자동 안전 잠금 기능을 갖추어 작업 효율과 안전성을 크게 향상함.
CAPACITOR BOX는 전력 시스템에서 커패시터를 안전하게 보관·연결하여 전압을 안정화하고 전력 손실을 감소시키는 역할을 함.
ARMGC PCR DRIVER는 PCR 반응을 위한 정밀 온도 제어와 빠른 사이클 전환을 제공하여 고신뢰성·고효율의 열 구동을 구현함.
스프레더 브레이크 모터는 구조 현장에서 차량 분리용 스프레더 장치의 제동을 정밀하게 제어하는 부품으로, 고출력 토크와 신뢰성 높은 내구성을 제공하며, 중고임에도 불구하고 설치·정비가 간편하고 견고함이 특징임.
유압펌프는 기계적 동력을 고압의 유압 에너지로 변환하여 시스템에 필요한 유체 흐름과 압력을 공급함으로써 고효율·정밀 제어가 가능함.
CONTROL UNIT은 시스템 전반의 동작을 중앙에서 관리하고, 입력 신호를 실시간으로 처리·전송하며, 다양한 하드웨어와 소프트웨어를 연동시켜 고속·정밀 제어를 구현함.
STS PTZ 카메라는 원격으로 팬·틸트·줌을 제어해 넓은 영역을 실시간 감시하고, 고해상도 영상과 자동 추적 기능을 제공함.

item_name:
PCB board for VSR 3 
(only complete box)
description: VSR 3용 PCB 보드는 전원 공급 및 속도 제어 회로를 하나의 완전한 박스에 통합해 고신뢰성을 제공하고, 손쉬운 설치와 교체가 가능함.
STS Spreader 유압 모터는 고토크와 고효율을 제공해 스프레더 장비의 물질 분산을 구동하며, 컴팩트한 구조와 내구성, 저소음 및 손쉬운 유지보수가 특징임.
STS SPREADER 유압 펌프는 고압 유압을 이용해 토양·자갈·시멘트 등을 균일하게 분산시키는 장비로, 고효율·소형·내구성·정밀 제어가 특징임.
GANTRY DRIVING WHEEL(JR80010500(1))은 고하중 물류·제조 시스템의 가니트 이동을 구동·지지하며, 내구성 높은 재질·저소음 설계·손쉬운 설치·정비가 특징임.
CPS Sensor는 비접촉식으로 물체 존재를 감지하며, 고감도·넓은 검출 거리·내구성·디지털 출력 기능을 제공함.
두산 STS 호이스트 인코더는 호이스트의 위치와 속도를 정밀하게 감지해 안전 운행을 지원하고, 고내구성·방진·방수 설계와 디지털 출력 기능을 제공함.
26IF(PROFIBUS)는 PLC와 PROFIBUS 현장버스 간의 통신을 담당하는 인터페이스 모듈로, 최대 31개의 슬레이브 장치를 12 Mbps의 고속으로 연결하고, 플러그인형 설계와 진단 LED·핫스와핑 기능 등을 제공함.
SHEAVE ASSEMBLY 5(JR870603A05)는 항공기·중장비 등에서 케이블·와이어를 유도·전달하는 풀리 어셈블리로, 고강도 알루미늄 합금 본체와 정밀 베어링을 적용해 내구성과 저소음 운전이 뛰어남.
자동 그리스 펌프는 기계 부품에 지속적인 윤활을 자동으로 공급하여 유지보수 시간을 절감하고, 유량 조절 및 무압력 작동이 가능한 휴대형 설계로 효율적인 윤활 관리가 가능함.
STS Doosan Trolley Wheel은 고하중 물류 카트에 사용되는 내구성 높은 휠로, 고강도 알루미늄 차축과 내마모성 폴리우레탄 타이어를 적용해 부하 용량이 크고 소음이 적으며 설치가 간편함.
STS(두산) 스프레더 케이블은 크레인 등 중량 장비의 리프팅 시 하중을 고르게 분산시켜 안정적인 작업을 가능하게 하며, 고강도 강선과 유연한 구조, 방청 코팅 및 내구성을 갖춘 설계가 특징임.
ARMGC Trolley Wheel은 물류·생산 현장의 트롤리와 카트에 장착되어 원활한 이동을 지원함과 동시에 고강도 알루미늄 합금 소재와 베어링 내구성, 저소음 설계 등으로 장시간 사용에도 안정성과 효율성을 제공함.
GANTRY DRIVING WHEEL(JR80010500(2))은 고정밀 자동화 설비의 가니트 이동을 구동하기 위한 고강도 휠로, 저소음·고내구성·정밀 제어가 가능함.
제어 카드는 설비의 동작을 실시간으로 제어·감시하고, 프로그래머블 로직, 고속 입·출력, 모듈식 설계 등으로 구성되어 있음.
LPS CAMERA는 고해상도 영상 촬영과 레이저 거리 측정을 동시에 수행하여 정밀한 3D 매핑 및 물체 인식을 가능하게 함.
Bromma Spreader Actuator는 비료·종자·살포기의 살포 폭과 유량을 정밀하게 제어해 균일한 살포를 구현하고, 내구성 높은 유압식 구동부와 간편한 설치·정비가 특징임.
Turbo Charger (3차 Y/T)는 엔진에 고압 공기를 공급해 출력과 토크를 크게 향상시키며, 고내열 합금 블레이드와 경량 하우징을 적용해 부스트 응답이 빠르고 내구성이 뛰어난 3세대 모델임.
Cross Fire는 실시간 전술 슈팅 게임으로, 다양한 무기와 맵, 팀 기반 전투를 제공함.
T/L/S 감속기 실린더 DOUBLE은 고정밀 선형 이동을 제공하면서 내장된 감속기를 통해 높은 토크와 저속 제어를 구현함으로써, 컴팩트한 구조와 이중 작동 방식으로 다양한 자동화 설비에 효율적인 구동력을 제공함.
TROLLEY WHEEL ASSEMBLY(JR87060101)는 물류·생산 현장의 트롤리·카트 등에 장착되어 원활한 이동과 방향 전환을 가능하게 하며, 고강도 알루미늄 프레임·베어링식 회전축·내식성 고무 트레드·높은 하중 지지력·간편한 교체가 특징임.
CP-316H/215AC110V는 110 V AC 입력으로 215 W 출력을 제공하는 고효율 산업용 전원 공급 장치이며, 과전압·과전류 보호와 내열·내습 설계가 특징함.
GANTRY DRIVING WHEEL(JR80010400(1))은 고하중을 견디면서 정밀한 이동을 가능하게 하는 가니트 크레인용 구동 휠로, 내마모성 소재와 저소음 설계, 간편한 설치가 특징임.
GANTRY DRIVEN WHEEL ASSEMBLY는 가틀리 시스템에서 고정밀 위치 제어와 대하중 운반을 위해 모터와 휠을 일체화한 고강도·저소음 구동 장치임.
GANTRY DRIVING WHEEL(JR80010400(2))은 고하중 물류·제조 현장의 가니트 크레인 구동에 사용되며, 고강도 강철 소재와 열처리된 내마모 표면, 저소음 설계 및 손쉬운 유지보수를 특징으로 함.
GANTRY DRIVING WHEEL ASSEMBLY는 가니트 구조의 자동화 설비를 구동하기 위한 회전 휠·모터·베어링 등을 일체화한 조립품으로, 고정밀 회전, 고하중 전송, 저소음 및 내구성을 특징으로 함.
ARMGC Trolley Wheel (Encoder_X)은 고정밀 엔코더가 내장된 견고한 트롤리 휠로, 자동화 설비 및 AGV의 이동과 위치 측정을 정확히 수행함.
ARMGC Trolley Wheel (Encoder_O)은 고정밀 엔코더가 내장된 트롤리 휠로, 물류·자동화 시스템에서 이동 경로를 정확히 측정하고, 내구성·저소음·간편 설치가 특징임.
TPS Laser Distance (Analog)는 레이저를 이용해 최대 200 m까지 고정밀 거리 측정을 가능하게 하며, 아날로그 디스플레이와 경량·배터리 구동 설계로 현장 작업 시 간편하고 빠르게 활용함.
스프레더에 장착되어 비료·농약 등의 분사량을 정밀하게 조절하고, 내식성·내구성이 뛰어나며 조절이 간편함.
STS(ZPMC) 스프레더 케이블은 컨테이너 크레인과 스프레더를 연결해 안전하고 효율적인 적재·하역을 가능하게 하는 고강도·내식성 소재의 케이블임.
STS 호이스트 와이어 로프(두산)는 고강도 강철선으로 제작되어 중량 물품을 안전하게 들어올릴 수 있으며, 내마모·내식성이 뛰어나 장시간 사용에도 신뢰성을 유지함.
BOOM HINGE ASSEMBLY PARTS는 크레인·굴착기 등 중장비의 붐(팔) 회전 및 각도 조절을 가능하게 하며, 고강도 합금 소재와 내구성 높은 베어링으로 구성되어 장시간 사용에도 안정성을 유지함.
WHEEL BRAKE POWER UNIT(JR‑CL01L)은 차량·기계의 휠 브레이크를 전자식으로 제어해 고정밀·고출력 제동력을 제공하고, 소형·경량 설계와 내구성 높은 부품으로 설치가 용이하고 신뢰성을 확보함.
STS Hoist Wire Rope(ZPMC)는 대형 컨테이너 크레인의 호이스트에 사용되는 고강도·내식성 와이어 로프로, 높은 인장강도와 뛰어난 내구성을 제공함.
STS 두산 SCR Motor는 고효율 가변속도 제어가 가능한 전동기로, 내구성이 뛰어나고 정밀한 토크 제어와 저소음 운전이 특징임.
SCR Slipring Assembly는 회전하는 기계에 전력을 무접점으로 전달하여 고속 회전에서도 신뢰성 높은 전송을 보장하고, 고내구성·방진·방수 설계가 적용됨.
STS(두산) 엘리베이터 하이브리드 케이블은 엘리베이터 승강기의 승강·제동을 담당하는 고강도·경량 하이브리드 케이블로, 내구성이 뛰어나 마모가 적고 진동을 억제하며 설치·정비가 용이함.
고정밀 레이저 거리 측정 센서로, 0.01 mm 이하의 측정 정확도와 200 m까지의 측정 범위, 빠른 응답 속도와 소형·내구성 설계를 제공함.
STS/ARMG GANTRY INVER터는 대형 가니트 시스템의 전동기를 정밀하게 제어하기 위한 고효율 인버터로, 고전압·고전류 출력, 실시간 모니터링 및 진단 기능, 방진·방수 등 내구성 높은 설계가 특징임.
ARMG TROLLEY INVERTER는 전동 트롤리의 전원을 DC에서 AC로 효율적으로 변환·제어하여 고효율·소형·내구성을 제공하고, 과전압·과전류 보호와 저소음 운전을 구현함.
WHEEL BRAKE POWER UNIT ASSEMBLY는 휠 브레이크에 전력을 공급해 제동력을 증강하고, 고효율 전자 제어와 내구성 높은 모듈식 설계를 갖춰 차량의 안전성과 성능을 향상시킴.
FIRE OPTIC ROTARY CONNECTOR는 회전하는 장치에 광신호를 끊김 없이 전달하여 화재 감시·제어 시스템 등에 사용되며, 저손실·고내열·방수 설계와 빠른 연결·분리 기능을 갖춤.
SILENCER (SCR)는 총기의 발사음과 반동을 크게 감소시켜 저소음 사격을 가능하게 하며, 경량 알루미늄 합금 구조와 빠른 탈착식 디자인을 주요 특징으로 함.
R/S 301호 터보차저는 엔진에 고압 공기를 공급해 출력과 토크를 크게 향상시키는 장치이며, 고효율 알루미늄 하우징·전기식 폐기밸브·내구성 높은 베어링을 적용해 가볍고 높은 부스트 압력을 제공함.
ARMGC PCR Slipring Assembly는 회전하는 기계에 전력·신호를 무접점으로 전달하여 회전 부품의 연속 구동을 가능하게 하며, 고속 회전·고내구성·방진·방수 설계·다중 채널 전송 기능 등을 주요 특징으로 함.
STS 호이스트 인버터는 전동 호이스트의 속도와 토크를 정밀 제어해 부드러운 상승·하강을 구현하고, 에너지 절감·과부하 보호·다중 안전 기능을 제공함.
ARMGC TROLLEY DRIVER(3단계)는 3단계 속도 조절이 가능한 전동 트롤리 구동 장치로, 인체공학적 손잡이와 과부하 보호 기능을 제공함.
전동기·로봇 등 회전하는 기계의 전원·신호를 브러시 없이 연속 전달하여 고신뢰성·소형·다축 구성을 구현함.
ARMGC LCL FILTER는 전력 인버터·그리드 연결 시스템에서 고조파 전류를 억제해 전력 품질을 향상시키며, 고감쇠·저손실·소형·경량 설계와 간편 설치가 특징임.
ARMGC POWER CABLE는 고전압 전력을 안전하게 전달하고, 내구성 높은 아머 재질과 방수·내열 특성을 갖추어 외부 충격과 환경 변화에 강함.
SILENCER(DPF)는 디젤 엔진 배기 가스의 미세먼지를 99 % 이상 차단해 환경오염을 감소시키고, 저압력 구조와 고내구성 소재를 적용해 장기간 유지보수가 용이함.
ARMGC LCL FILTER(3단계)는 공기·가스 흐름에서 입자·수분·유해 가스를 순차적으로 3단계로 제거하여 시스템의 청정도와 효율성을 크게 향상시킴.
STS LCL 필터는 전력 시스템에 적용되어 고조파와 전압 변동을 억제함으로써 전력 품질을 향상시키는 저비용·고효율의 라인‑투‑라인 필터임.
BOOM WIRE ROPE(DOOSAN)는 크레인 붐의 하중 지지 및 연장을 위한 고강도 강선 로프이며, 높은 인장 강도와 낮은 신장률, 부식 방지 코팅 및 뛰어난 유연성을 갖추어 안전하고 긴 수명을 제공함.
ALIMAX 주파수 변환기는 입력 전원의 주파수를 자유롭게 변환하여 모터 속도 제어와 에너지 효율을 향상시키며, 고정밀 디지털 제어, 과부하·과전압 보호, 다양한 출력 전압·주파수 범위 제공 등 다중 기능을 갖춤.
STS TROLLEY/BOOM & ARMGC 호이스트 인버터는 크레인 트롤리·붐·암에 적용되어 전동 호이스트의 속도와 토크를 정밀 제어하고, 에너지 절감·과부하 보호·무선 모니터링 기능을 제공함.
STS 두산 SCR Gear Box는 SCR 설비에 동력을 효율적으로 전달하고, 고강도 합금 소재와 방청 설계로 내구성을 높이며, 소형·경량 구조와 저소음·고효율 특성을 갖춤.
TROLLEY GEAR REDUCER는 트롤리 구동에 필요한 토크를 감속해 부하를 효율적으로 전달하고, 고강도 합금 소재와 밀폐형 설계로 내구성과 유지보수성을 확보함.
ARMGC ISU DRIVER(3단계)는 ARMGC 이미지 신호 유닛을 제어·연동하여 입력·처리·출력의 3단계 데이터 흐름을 고속·저지연으로 관리하고, 다양한 인터페이스 지원과 오류 복구 기능을 제공함.
ARMGC HOIST/GANTRY DRIVER(3단계)는 중량 물체를 안전하게 수직·수평으로 이동시키는 고정밀 3단계 기어 구동식 호이스트·갠트리 드라이버이며, 고하중 용량·정밀 위치 제어·내구성 있는 구조를 특징으로 함.
TPS3.5는 고정밀 비접촉식 타깃 위치를 실시간으로 측정하며, 0.1 mm 이하의 해상도와 넓은 온도 범위·내구성을 제공함.
R/S Engine은 실시간 물리 연산과 고성능 렌더링을 제공해 레이싱·시뮬레이션 게임 개발에 활용되며, 멀티스레드 지원·모듈형 구조·플러그인 확장성을 갖춤.
TROLLEY GEAR REDUCER(FH475.28.A1A-00)는 트롤리 구동용 속도 감속 및 토크 증대를 위해 설계된 고효율·고강도 감속기이며, 콤팩트한 구조와 내구성 있는 재질, 정밀 기어 메쉬 및 쉬운 유지보수를 특징으로 함.
STS 두산 Hoist Motor는 고효율·고토크를 제공해 중량 물품을 안전하게 승강시키는 산업용 호이스트에 적용되며, 컴팩트한 구조와 뛰어난 내구성, 정밀 속도 제어 기능을 갖춤.
HOIST GEAR REDUCER(FH1600.82.C4A-00)는 고하중 호이스트에 적용되는 고효율·고강도 감속기로, 컴팩트한 구조와 정밀한 기어 메쉬, 내구성 있는 소재를 사용해 장시간 안정적인 운전이 가능함.
HOIST GEAR REDUCER는 하중을 효율적으로 감속·전달하여 크레인·리프팅 장비의 정밀 제어와 고속·고토크 운전을 가능하게 함.

1*32MM 소켓 렌치는 소켓과 렌치가 일체형으로 결합된 공구로, 32mm 직경의 볼트와 너트를 신속하고 정확하게 조임·해제할 수 있다. 내부 스프링-로드 구조는 토크 전달을 최적화하여 과부하를 방지하며, 견고한 설계 덕분에 높은 정밀도와 내구성을 제공한다. 산업 설비의 조립·정비 과정에서 정밀 토크 제어가 요구되는 고정 장치 유지보수에 필수적으로 사용된다.

- 마크다운, 제목, 번호 없이 설명 문장만 출력

description: 10SQ 롱 슬리브는 회전축 보호 및 정밀 제어를 위한 장착부품으로, 내구성이 뛰어난 합금으로 제작되어 높은 부하 하에서도 변형 없이 장기간 사용이 가능합니다. 슬리브 내부는 윤활유가 고르게 분포되도록 설계되어, 기어와 베어링 간 마찰을 최소화하며, 장비의 소음을 감소시킵니다. 주로 산업용 전동기와 모터 어셈블리에서 회전축을 보호하고 효율성을 높이기 위해 사용됩니다.

description: Brake Chamber Nut (가공품) 핵심 기능은 브레이크 챔버 내부의 부품을 견고하게 고정하는 것입니다. 작동 원리는 나사를 조임으로써 하이드롤릭 라인과 챔버 구조를 시공계정합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 브레이크 챔버의 압력 무결성을 유지하여 안전한 제동 성능을 보장하는 것입니다. Brake Chamber (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 유체를 저장하고 압력을 전달하는 챔버입니다. 작동 원리는 압축된 유체가 챔버 내부에서 흐르며 브레이크 액션을 발생시킵니다. 실제 사용 목적은 제동 시스템의 효율적인 작동을 위해 유체 압력을 안정적으로 공급하는 것입니다. Air Chamber (가공품) 핵심 기능은 압축 공기를 저장하고 조절하는 챔버입니다. 작동 원리는 압축 공기가 챔버 내부에 저장되고 필요 시 공급되어 기계적 움직임을 유도합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 공압 시스템에서 일정한 압력을 제공해 실린더와 다른 장치를 구동하는 것입니다. Air Cylinder (가공품) 핵심 기능은 압축 공력을 선형 운동으로 변환하는 실린더입니다. 작동 원리는 챔버에 유입된 공기가 피스톤을 밀어 선형 운동을 발생시킵니다. 실제 사용 목적은 물체를 올리거나 밀어내는 등 기계적 동작을 수행하는 것입니다. Hydraulic Cylinder (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 압력을 선형 힘으로 변환하는 실린더입니다. 작동 원리는 유체가 피스톤을 압축하여 강력한 선형력을 발생시킵니다. 실제 사용 목적은 무거운 물체를 들어 올리거나 가공 기계에서 힘을 전달하는 것입니다. Hydraulic Oil (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 시스템에서 윤활과 냉각, 압력 전달을 담당하는 유체입니다. 작동 원리는 유체가 압력을 전달하고 마찰을 줄이며 열을 흡수합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 하이드롤릭 부품의 마모를 방지하고 시스템 효율을 높이는 것입니다. Hydraulic Pump (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 유체에 압력을 가해 공급하는 펌프입니다. 작동 원리는 기계적 동력을 유체 압력으로 변환하여 유체를 순환시킵니다. 실제 사용 목적은 실린더와 같은 하이드롤릭 장치에 지속적인 압력을 제공해 동작을 수행하게 하는 것입니다. Air Compressor (가공품) 핵심 기능은 대기 중의 공기를 압축해 저장 및 공급하는 장치입니다. 작동 원리는 고정밀 압축기를 이용해 공기를 고압으로 만들고 탱크에 저장합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 공압 시스템에 필요한 압축 공기를 안정적으로 공급해 기계나 장치를 동작시키는 것입니다. Air Filter (가공품) 핵심 기능은 압축 공기에서 먼지와 이물질을 제거하는 필터입니다. 작동 원리는 공기가 필터 매체를 통과하면서 부유 물질이 잡히는 방식으로 동작합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 공압 부품의 오염을 방지하고 장치 수명을 연장하는 것입니다. Air Dryer (가공품) 핵심 기능은 압축 공기에서 수분을 제거해 건조하게 만드는 장치입니다. 작동 원리는 수증기를 흡착하거나 냉각하여 물을 분리해내는 방식을 사용합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 공압 라인에 물이 남아 부식이나 성능 저하를 일으키지 않도록 보호하는 것입니다. Air Separator (가공품) 핵심 기능은 압축 공기에서 물방울과 오일을 분리해 주는 장치입니다. 작동 원리는 회전원리 또는 결합체를 이용해 액체를 공기와 분리합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 downstream 장비에 청정한 공기를 공급해 오염 및 마모를 방지하는 것입니다. Oil Filter (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 오일에서 입자와 오염 물질을 걸러내는 필터입니다. 작동 원리는 오일이 필터 매체를 통과하면서 불순물이 포집됩니다. 실제 사용 목적은 하이드롤릭 부품의 마모를 줄이고 수명을 연장하는 것입니다. Oil Cooler (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 오일의 온도를 낮춰 주는 냉각기입니다. 작동 원리는 열교환기를 통해 오일의 열을 방출하거나 냉각수를 순환시켜 열을 흡수합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 오일 온도를 최적 범위로 유지해 시스템 안정성과 효율을 보장하는 것입니다. Oil Cooler (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 오일을 냉각해 과열을 방지하는 장치입니다. 작동 원리는 오일이 냉각 코일을 통과하면서 열을 방출하도록 설계됩니다. 실제 사용 목적은 오일의 온도를 적정 수준으로 유지해 부품 마모를 최소화하고 성능을 유지하는 것입니다. Air Compressor (가공품) 핵심 기능은 대기 중의 공기를 고압으로 압축해 저장하고 공급하는 장치입니다. 작동 원리는 내부 가스 압축 메커니즘을 통해 공기를 압축하고 압축 탱크에 저장합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 공압 시스템에 필요한 압력을 안정적으로 제공해 장비와 도구를 동작시키는 것입니다. Oil Cooler (가공품) 핵심 기능은 하이드롤릭 오일의 온도를 낮추어 과열을 방지하는 냉각기입니다. 작동 원리는 냉각 코일이나 냉각수 순환을 통해 오일의 열을 효과적으로 방출합니다. 실제 사용 목적은 오일 온도를 최적 범위로 유지해 시스템의 신뢰성과 부품 수명을 향상시키는 것입니다.

Technical Whitepaper

## The ZPMC Supply Chain

Navigating the complex BOM of ZPMC Ship-to-Shore cranes. Sourcing genuine port machinery parts for electrical and mechanical systems.

### 1. Decapsulating the ZPMC Electrical Room

ZPMC dominates 70% of the global STS crane market. Inside the electrical room (E-Room), you’ll typically find a Siemens S7 PLC o ABB drive system. However, many auxiliary components like contactors, relays, and limit switches are locally sourced Chinese brands (e.g., Chint or custom ZPMC-spec).

Zhenke’s Advantage: We are based in the Yangtze River Delta, the heart of ZPMC’s supplier network. We can identify and supply the exact OEM electrical components without the need for expensive retrofitting.

#### CRANE BRAKING

ZPMC relies on Bubenzer o Sibre brakes for hoist and gantry motion.

- ✓ Seal Kits for Calipers
- ✓ Sintered Brake Pads
- ✓ Brake Thrusters (Electro-Hydraulic)

#### SHEAVES & WIRE ROPE

We supply OEM sheaves manufactured by ZPMC’s designated casting foundries.

- ✓ Anti-Twist Wire Rope
- ✓ Nylon Sheaves
- ✓ Hot Rolled Sheaves

#### SPREADER PARTS

Parts for ZPMC’s own brand spreaders and Bromma/RAM integrations.

- ✓ Landing Pins
- ✓ Flipper Arms
- ✓ Twistlock Pins

### 2. Obsolescence Management for Older Cranes

Many ZPMC cranes delivered in the early 2000s use components that are now obsolete. For example, older Ansaldo drives or specific Japanese limit switches may no longer be in production.

The Zhenke Solution: We provide engineering support to cross-reference these obsolete parts with modern, form-fit-function equivalents from the original component manufacturers. This ensures your 20-year-old STS crane remains operational without a complete control system overhaul.

### 3. Critical Steel: Sheaves & Trolley Wheels

A ZPMC STS crane operates 24/7, placing immense stress on the wire rope sheaves. OEM ZPMC sheaves are typically Hot Rolled Steel with a hardness of HB 220-260. Over time, “Corrugation” (wavy wear patterns) develops in the groove, which rapidly destroys expensive wire ropes.

Zhenke Maintenance Protocol: We supply direct replacements from ZPMC’s casting supplier in Nantong. For high-cycle cranes, we also offer Nylon (MC Polyamide) sheaves which reduce wire rope wear by up to 40% and lower the boom weight.

Trolley Wheel Warning:

ZPMC trolley wheels use a specific interference fit for the bearings. Using local machine shop copies often results in bearing spin inside the hub. Our port machinery parts include fully assembled wheel blocks with SKF/FAG bearings pre-pressed to factory tolerance.

#### Sheave Groove Analysis: Worn vs. New

CORRUGATED GROOVE (Rope Killer)

ZHENKE OEM (Hot Rolled Steel)

### 4. Stopping Power: Bubenzer & ZPMC Brakes

Safety on an STS crane depends on the Emergency Gantry Brakes and Hoist Brakes. ZPMC universally adopts Pintsch Bubenzer o Sibre systems. The weak link is often the electro-hydraulic thruster (Ed 30/50 etc.).

We stock the complete range of Bubenzer repair kits, including sintered brake pads, thruster seal kits, and hydraulic release units. Regular replacement of the thruster oil and seals is mandatory to prevent “brake drag” which can overheat the main hoist motor.

| Diámetro: | Custom (400mm – 1200mm) |

| Oil Type: | Low Temp Hydraulic Oil |

### 5. Global Supply from the Source

Sourcing parts for ZPMC cranes outside of China can be slow. Local agents often wait for shipments from Shanghai. Zhenke Machinery is located in Ningbo, just across the bay from the ZPMC Changxing base.

We consolidate electrical components (relays, sensors) with heavy mechanical parts (wheels, twistlocks) into a single shipment. We understand the urgency of a “Crane Down” situation and offer Express Air Freight for critical components like PLC modules or brake thrusters.

Shanghai Zhenhua Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. (ZPMC) - Shanghai Zhenhua Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. (ZPMC)

New RTG gantry structure by ZPMC

time：2019/02/27 00:00:00

Recently, ZPMC developed the hub motor driving unit for RTG gantry, a new embedded one with the complete independent intellectual property right leading in the world, solving the problem of complicated maintenance due to too many different parts for half a century with the technology quite different from traditional technology in the same industry.

More than ten thousand of RTG are used in the global ports as main operation equipment for container terminals. In the past half century, the traditional mode of wheel and chain has been using in the driving unit of RTG gantry, causing problems of low transmission efficiency, too much impact and vibration in operation and difficulty in accurate positioning due to loose structure, as well as high requirements for maintenance and oil leakage. To solve the problems, the expert team by ZPMC made careful study and detailed design for nearly two years before developing the embedded hub motor driving unit.

“It seems that we are dancing on the edge of a knife.”, said Jiang Hao, a development member of the project. The development team made a breakthrough to embed the 30KW driving unit of the motor, reducer and brake into a cavity of 5cm in the diameter. The full natural cooling mode is used to replace the common hydraulic cooling mode, making sure no maintenance for the RTG gantry driving unit. The unit consists of the new permanent magnet motor and Planetary reducer, replacing various components of wheel, chain, coupling, bearing and cover of traditional RTG gantry. It features simple structure, high efficiency, environment protection and operation without maintenance, changing the previous cumbrous structure completely.

# ZPMC Crane Parts
Supporting the giants. We supply genuine electrical, mechanical, and hydraulic components for **ZPMC STS Cranes** y **RTGs** directly from the Shanghai manufacturing base.
Connecting to ZPMC Inventory…
LOAD MORE PARTS
Technical Whitepaper
## The ZPMC Supply Chain
Navigating the complex BOM of ZPMC Ship-to-Shore cranes. Sourcing genuine port machinery parts for electrical and mechanical systems.
### 1. Decapsulating the ZPMC Electrical Room
ZPMC dominates 70% of the global STS crane market. Inside the electrical room (E-Room), you’ll typically find a **Siemens S7 PLC** o **ABB** drive system. However, many auxiliary components like contactors, relays, and limit switches are locally sourced Chinese brands (e.g., Chint or custom ZPMC-spec).
**Zhenke’s Advantage:** We are based in the Yangtze River Delta, the heart of ZPMC’s supplier network. We can identify and supply the exact OEM electrical components without the need for expensive retrofitting.
#### CRANE BRAKING
ZPMC relies on **Bubenzer** o **Sibre** brakes for hoist and gantry motion.
* ✓ Brake Thrusters (Electro-Hydraulic)
* ✓ Sintered Brake Pads
* ✓ Seal Kits for Calipers
#### SHEAVES & WIRE ROPE
We supply OEM sheaves manufactured by ZPMC’s designated casting foundries.
* ✓ Hot Rolled Sheaves
* ✓ Nylon Sheaves
* ✓ Anti-Twist Wire Rope
#### SPREADER PARTS
Parts for ZPMC’s own brand spreaders and Bromma/RAM integrations.
* ✓ Twistlock Pins
* ✓ Flipper Arms
* ✓ Landing Pins
### 2. Obsolescence Management for Older Cranes
Many ZPMC cranes delivered in the early 2000s use components that are now obsolete. For example, older **Ansaldo** drives or specific Japanese limit switches may no longer be in production.
**The Zhenke Solution:** We provide engineering support to cross-reference these obsolete parts with modern, form-fit-function equivalents from the original component manufacturers. This ensures your 20-year-old STS crane remains operational without a complete control system overhaul.
### 3. Critical Steel: Sheaves & Trolley Wheels
A ZPMC STS crane operates 24/7, placing immense stress on the wire rope sheaves. OEM ZPMC sheaves are typically Hot Rolled Steel with a hardness of HB 220-260. Over time, “Corrugation” (wavy wear patterns) develops in the groove, which rapidly destroys expensive wire ropes.
**Zhenke Maintenance Protocol:** We supply direct replacements from ZPMC’s casting supplier in Nantong. For high-cycle cranes, we also offer **Nylon (MC Polyamide)** sheaves which reduce wire rope wear by up to 40% and lower the boom weight.
**Trolley Wheel Warning:**
ZPMC trolley wheels use a specific interference fit for the bearings. Using local machine shop copies often results in bearing spin inside the hub. Our port machinery parts include fully assembled wheel blocks with SKF/FAG bearings pre-pressed to factory tolerance.
#### Sheave Groove Analysis: Worn vs. New
CORRUGATED GROOVE (Rope Killer)
ZHENKE OEM (Hot Rolled Steel)
### 4. Stopping Power: Bubenzer & ZPMC Brakes
Safety on an STS crane depends on the **Emergency Gantry Brakes** and Hoist Brakes. ZPMC universally adopts **Pintsch Bubenzer** o **Sibre** systems. The weak link is often the electro-hydraulic thruster (Ed 30/50 etc.).
We stock the complete range of Bubenzer repair kits, including sintered brake pads, thruster seal kits, and hydraulic release units. Regular replacement of the thruster oil and seals is mandatory to prevent “brake drag” which can overheat the main hoist motor.

### 5. Global Supply from the Source
Sourcing parts for ZPMC cranes outside of China can be slow. Local agents often wait for shipments from Shanghai. **Zhenke Machinery** is located in Ningbo, just across the bay from the ZPMC Changxing base.
We consolidate electrical components (relays, sensors) with heavy mechanical parts (wheels, twistlocks) into a single shipment. We understand the urgency of a “Crane Down” situation and offer **Express Air Freight** for critical components like PLC modules or brake thrusters.

# STS Spreader Flippers

## NEW SOLUTION FOR AN OLD PROBLEM! THE FLEXIFLIPPER
Intella Parts Company is pleased to introduce the new and innovative Flexi-Flipper for STS crane spreaders. It is basically providing a new solution for an old problem! Want to see it for yourself? Check out our product videos below on how the FlexiFlippers perform in real life.
### How much does one hour of downtime on your crane cost?
When traditional flippers get snagged and break, containers can get stuck and cause expensive delays.The FlexiFlipper solves that problem. Standard flippers can perform an average of approximately 4,000 cycles before it needs to be replaced or repaired, due to being damaged during normal operations. Outdated flippers are just expensive to maintain and cause excessive damage. When using the patented Flexi-Flippers you will able to run up to 360,000 cycles before the two-part steel body has to be replaced.
### Durability, flexibility and affordability combined
The Flexi-Flipper consists of two pieces of heavy duty steel. A separate upper and lower piece which are bolted to a reinforced polymer cushion. The polymer cushion itself can perform up to 360,000 cycles before it needs to be replaced. Due to its construction the FlexiFlipper combines rigidity with flexibility and elasticity and is able to prevent being damaged. The Flexiflipper can to do every task one is used to do with standard flippers, but outperforms the standard flippers when it comes to durability. The Flexi-Flipper does not get damaged by impacts when it is incorrectly grounded, or impacts into a container or cell guides. There is even more good news. This top quality product comes at a competitive price and can be used on existing Bromma, Elme or RAM spreaders.

## NEW SOLUTION FOR AN OLD PROBLEM! THE FLEXIFLIPPER
Intella Parts Company is pleased to introduce the new and innovative Flexi-Flipper for STS crane spreaders. It is basically providing a new solution for an old problem! Want to see it for yourself? Check out our product videos below on how the FlexiFlippers perform in real life.
### How much does one hour of downtime on your crane cost?
When traditional flippers get snagged and break, containers can get stuck and cause expensive delays.The FlexiFlipper solves that problem. Standard flippers can perform an average of approximately 4,000 cycles before it needs to be replaced or repaired, due to being damaged during normal operations. Outdated flippers are just expensive to maintain and cause excessive damage. When using the patented Flexi-Flippers you will able to run up to 360,000 cycles before the two-part steel body has to be replaced.
### Durability, flexibility and affordability combined
The Flexi-Flipper consists of two pieces of heavy duty steel. A separate upper and lower piece which are bolted to a reinforced polymer cushion. The polymer cushion itself can perform up to 360,000 cycles before it needs to be replaced. Due to its construction the FlexiFlipper combines rigidity with flexibility and elasticity and is able to prevent being damaged. The Flexiflipper can to do every task one is used to do with standard flippers, but outperforms the standard flippers when it comes to durability. The Flexi-Flipper does not get damaged by impacts when it is incorrectly grounded, or impacts into a container or cell guides. There is even more good news. This top quality product comes at a competitive price and can be used on existing Bromma, Elme or RAM spreaders.

The base of any round rope is the strands that lay around central element – the core. The core, can be made from fiber (organic or synthetic), metal (arranged as a wire strand or as an independent wire rope), solid polymer or combination of materials. The strands of the rope consist of an assembly of wires of appropriate shape and dimensions laid helically in the same direction in one or more layers around a center.

The rope performance, its fatigue resistance, abrasive wear resistance and radial rigidity (crush resistance, for example, in case of multi-layer lay on drum) depend on the choice of strand and rope construction.

#### The main types of the steel rope strand constructions

S – Seale

(LD-О)

W – Warrington

(LD-R)

F — Filler

(LD-z)

WS – Warrington-Seale

(LD-RО)

M

(TD)

N

( )

| A parallel lay strand construction which contains of at least two layers with the same number of wires of different diameters laid in one operation and in the same direction. | Parallel lay strand construction having an outer layer containing alternately large and small wires and twice the number of wires as the inner layer. | Parallel lay strand construction having an outer layer containing twice the number of wires than the inner layer, with filler wires laid in the interstices between the layers. |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Parallel lay strand construction having three or more layers laid in one operation and formed from a combination of strand types Warrington and Seale | Constructions of the strand laid in several operations in which wires of superimposed layers cross one another and have a point contact. | A construction of a strand laid in several operations that has at least three layers of wires, the outer layer of which is laid onto the central construction of the parallel lay. |

Increasing the number of wires and reducing their diameter allows to increase the fatigue resistance of the rope, but it reduces the abrasive wear resistance. Reducing the number of wires in the strands and increasing their diameter allows to increase the abrasive wear resistance, but it reduce the fatigue resistance of the rope. By choosing a six-strand cross-lay rope with a metal core, we get increased crush resistance during a multi-layer lay on the drum, unlike the multi-strand ropes, ropes with a fiber core or lang-lay ropes which are poorly resistant to radial loads. Ropes with polymer coating of a metal core can be used at wider angles of deviation than regular ropes.

That is why the choice of rope, as well as choice of any other equipment, should be made precisely and very carefully. It is necessary to take into account all the working conditions and parameters of the rope.

#### The main types of cores of steel ropes

The core is the most important element of the steel rope construction. It is the core that is responsible for preserving the shape and size of the rope cross section and it serves as a source of lubrication for the inner region of the rope strands during operation.

FC – Fiber core

EPIWRC – independent wire rope core covered with a polymer

WC Steel core – WC

WSC –wire strand core

IWRC –independent wire rope core

#### Lay directions and types

sZ – right ordinary lay

zS – left ordinary lay

zZ – right lang lay

sS – left lang lay

aZ – right alternate lay

aS – left alternate lay

#### Processing technology of steel rope manufacturing contributing to increase their life

##### Manufacturing methods that extends steel wire rope lifespan

Ropes with compacted strands

One of the effective ways to extend steel wire rope lifespan is to make it with compacted strands. Before the strands are braid into a steel wire rope they are exposed to radiate swaging which cause wire deformation resulting into solidified structure and dense cross section. In the process of swaging, the outer diameter of the strand decreases, the metal cross-section area increases, since the voids between the wires inside the strand are filled. The surface of the strand becomes smoother.

##### Improving of strand contact conditions

Locking out of wires is possible

Locking out of wires is excepted

##### Reducing of contact pressures

Advantages of compacted strands:

- Contact between outer strands and contact between layers of rope on the drum are far better comparing to regular round strand ropes
- Ropes with swaged strands have high abrasive wear and flexural fatigue resistance
- Smooth surface of swaged strands provides better contact with surface of pulleys and drums resulting in higher endurance of equipment and of the

HyperTEN+ is a thermally pre-stretched high-end fiber rope made of original Dyneema® SK78 fibers. It is mainly used in industrial applications that require the highest breaking forces, resistance to bending fatigue and the lowest elongation at low weight. In addition to very low weight, this superlative fibre rope offers maximum breaking strength and reduced UHMWPE-typical creep properties. Produced with STS-Stronger Than Steel® technology When looking for particularly high-performing ropes, one automatically thinks of steel wire ropes. But now we have STS – Stronger Than Steel®. Conceived and constructed by TEUFELBERGER’s development team, this fiber rope is not only much lighter than a steel wire rope, but also much more effective. This is made possible by a combination of high-tech fibers, an optimized rope design, and an innovative pre-stretching process. This process lends highest breaking forces to the rope that, combined with minimal weight and diameter, make it ideally suited for a variety of industrial applications. HyperTEN+ is available with a PES cover, which impresses with maximum resistance to bending cycles. HyperTEN+ is of course specifically adapted to your application. Individual end connections such as

Splice with or without plastic, steel, stainless steel or tubular thimble,

End bond,

Stitching,

Swaging,

Tapered end and

[Slaice]®

are the perfect link between the rope and your attachment point.HyperTEN+ offers the following advantages and features:

Made of original Dyneema® SK78 fiber

1/7 of the weight of comparable steel ropes

Highest possible breaking strength - higher than almost all steel ropes on the market with the same diameter

No corrosion or contamination by rope grease

Reduced risk of injury, easy and quick handling

Flexible design

Reduced UHMWPE-typical creep

Completely abrasion resistant due to very smooth surface, especially when provided with a cover

Very low initial and working stretch (already eliminated during the production process)

Features highest flexural fatigue strength and extremely long lifetime – compared to the standard fiber, the XBO variant offers 300 - 400 % more lifetime in terms of bending cycles

Highest running smoothness thanks to the extremely compact cross-section that is very stable under transverse pressure

The kinetic energy unleashed when damage to the rope occurs is significantly lower than with steel wire ropes

# Drum Dolly with Handle

## DDL200

Our drum dolly with handle is suitable for moving drums of up to 220 litres around the workplace. You can load the dolly using an STS drum lifter, drum rotator or another suitable drum handler. The dolly is made from mild steel and has a grit blasted and powder-coated finish; we can also offer a 304-grade stainless steel option.

Watch training video

## DDL200

Our drum dolly with handle is suitable for moving drums of up to 220 litres around the workplace. You can load the dolly using an STS drum lifter, drum rotator or another suitable drum handler. The dolly is made from mild steel and has a grit blasted and powder-coated finish; we can also offer a 304-grade stainless steel option.

Watch training video

## Key product features

### High-quality wheels

### High-quality wheels

This model has 100mm fixed front wheels and 100mm rear braked castors. When you leave the Drum Dolly in a static position, the braked castors ensure the dolly doesn't roll away. The wheels used on our drum dollies include precision bearings as standard; this ensures a low rolling resistance making the dollies easy to move around.

### Quality fabrication

### Quality fabrication

We understand the tough industrial environment manual handling equipment is used in. As such we endeavour to design and manufacture drum handling equipment that lasts a long time after many years of use. Welding quality is important to us and as such we employ only qualified and skilled welders to fabricate our equipment. The oil drum dolly shown has a CNC brake press folded tray which is then welded at the seams. Each weld is inspected by a second welder fabricator before leaving our fabrication shop.

### Fixed handle

### Fixed handle

Positioned at an ergonomic height, the fixed handle allows you to easily and comfortably move drums around the factory floor. Should you wish to source a dolly without a handle, we can offer a handleless drum dolly as an alternative solution. For large bulk orders, we can customise the design of the drum dolly to suit a particular application or industrial process.

### Drum suitability

### Drum suitability

You can use our 205 Litre Drum Dolly to transport a variety of drum types, shapes and sizes. For more information, take a look at our drum suitability document below. There are tens of different drum styles available on the market and many manufacturers are bringing out innovative new drum designs each year. We've designed this drum dolly to handle a wide range of drum types and sizes.

View drum suitability

### ATEX / UKEX-certified for gas and dust zones 1, 2, 21 and 22 (optional)

### ATEX / UKEX-certified for gas and dust zones 1, 2, 21 and 22 (optional)

We can provide certified ATEX / UKEX drum dollies for use in hazardous zoned work environments. The DDL200-Ex is suitable for zones 1, 2, 21 and 22 - gas and dust classified spaces, where explosive or potentially explosive atmospheres exist.

An ATEX / UKEX drum dolly is supplied with anti-static wheels and earthing chains as standard. The dolly is manufactured to ensure electrical continuity, and a path to ground is always present. We supply our ATEX / UKEX dollies with a manufacturer’s Declaration of Conformity which demonstrates compliance with the directives and relevant British and ISO Standards.

# Oil Drum Dolly

## DDL01

Drum dollies come in all shapes and sizes; this model has been designed to be small, compact and hard wearing. The dolly consists of a central x-frame with an outer steel ring. The dolly is fitted with four swivel braked castors for easy maneuvering, the brakes are useful when leaving drums unattended in a storage area. We are able to offer stainless steel models if required.

Watch training video

## DDL01

Drum dollies come in all shapes and sizes; this model has been designed to be small, compact and hard wearing. The dolly consists of a central x-frame with an outer steel ring. The dolly is fitted with four swivel braked castors for easy maneuvering, the brakes are useful when leaving drums unattended in a storage area. We are able to offer stainless steel models if required.

Watch training video

## Key product features

### High-quality wheels and bearings

### High-quality wheels and bearings

Rolling resistance is determined by the types and qualities of the wheels used. We use castors made from premium polyurethane tyres with aluminium hubs. All the castors utilise precision bearings to further reduce rolling resistance.

To keep a loaded drum dolly in a static position when not in use all four castors are fitted with foot-operated park brakes as standard. If your company requires a bespoke wheel specification for a particular project then please get in touch.

### Fabricated by qualified welders

### Fabricated by qualified welders

Industrial environments are tough on equipment due to constant use and heavy handling. We design and manufacture equipment so that it lasts decades and not just a few years. Our team of experienced welder fabricators manufacture equipment making use of industry best practices. Upon completion of a batch of welded products, a second welder inspects all welds to ensure quality, conformity and zero defects.

### Safe drum loading

### Safe drum loading

This oil drum dolly can be loaded using one of our Drum Tippers or Drum Lifting Trolleys. Alternately another safe piece of drum handling equipment can be used to place the drum onto the dolly. It is important the dolly is only used on flat and level ground to prevent accidental roll-away which could cause injury. For other tips on drum handling safety view our latest safety guidance.

# STS Crane Trolley Wheel

Crane wheels are classified into numerous categories based on different standards, such as single edge and double edge crane wheels, casting and forging crane wheels, overhead crane wheels, STS gantry crane wheels or STS crane trolley wheels.

Send Inquiry

Chat Now

Product Introduction

##### BVEE Types of crane wheels

Crane wheels are classified into numerous categories based on different standards, such as single edge and double edge crane wheels, casting and forging crane wheels, overhead crane wheels, STS gantry crane wheels or STS crane trolley wheels.

##### BVEE processing of trolley wheel

In order to ensure the high quality of crane wheels assembly, the quality inspections should be applied through the whole crane wheel production procedure from design, material selection, heat treatment and others, etc.

The main production of STS crane wheels are as follow:

Crane wheel drawing, 3d modeling, Fem Analysis, Blank wheel, rough machining, Heat treatment, Finish machining, Hardness testing, assembling,etc.

##### Heat treatment of overhead crane wheels

The wheel tread must be heat treated to increase the load capacity and service life of crane wheels. The medial surface of the wheel hardness must be 300-380HB, with a 20mm hardened depth of not less than 260HB, which can be achieved utilizing a variety of heat treatments under current technical conditions.

##### The hardness of crane wheels raw material

STS crane trolley wheels are typically built of raw materials such alloys, low-carbon steel, or medium-carbon steel. Because of its wide availability and low cost, medium-carbon steel is the most often utilized raw material in crane wheel production.

Heat treatment procedures are used to increase the hardness of metals.

The hardness of crane wheels constructed of medium-carbon steel has been rising as a result of developments in heat treating technology, which is particularly noticeable at the tread and where the tread meets the rail.

##### Forging crane wheels or casting crane wheels?

Crane wheels that have been forged are substantially more durable. Crane wheels forging ensures constant strength, grain flow, and directional strength, all of which are plainly visible metallurgical faults throughout the forging process.

Forging crane is more reliable. Forging crane wheels has improved reliability for the following reasons:

During the production, the grain pattern is refined.

The strength of the crane wheels is maximized by generating grain flow orientation.

According to third-party study, the forging crane wheel has a 26 percent higher tensile strength and 37 percent higher fatigue strength.

##### BVEE Advantages of crane wheels

Designed with high-quality materials that can be modified.

Supervised and advanced manufacture assures a uniform contour hardness in the tread and inner flange wear surfaces, as well as a ductile core to withstand shock loads.

Improve your rail's lift.

Quick delivery within the specified time frame.

##### FAQ

A: 1). Product information: Quantity, specification

2). Delivery time required.

3). Shipping information: Company name, address, phone number, destination seaport/air port.

4). Forwarder's contact details if there is any in China.

Q: How about your payment terms?

Q: Can I use our own logo?

A: Yes, we can produce by using your own logo if you need.

Q: How about sample & MOQ policy?

A: Welcome sample order. MOQ can be 1 set.

Q: What is your lead time for your goods?

# Barrel Trolley

## DTC02

Designed for screw top and other plastic barrels, this Barrel Trolley was designed to cater for unusual barrel types found infrequently within industry. This trolley has been designed with operators in mind, making the handling of heavy HDPE barrels safe and easy.

Watch training video

## DTC02

Designed for screw top and other plastic barrels, this Barrel Trolley was designed to cater for unusual barrel types found infrequently within industry. This trolley has been designed with operators in mind, making the handling of heavy HDPE barrels safe and easy.

Watch training video

## Key product features

### Rubber pad design

### Rubber pad design

Unlike traditional oil drums, plastic screw top drums don't have a defined top lip to grip onto, for this reason, we use a band on the DTC02 instead of a drum gripper. We supply this plastic barrel trolley with a set of rubber-lined fixed radius pads. The pads grip the drum and along with the ratchet securing system secure the barrel in place. The pads accommodate a wide range of barrel diameters and are useful when unusual plastic barrels need to be moved. If you are handling a drum that has a defined top lip then our signature Universal Drum Trolley can be used instead.

### Ratchet and securing strap

### Ratchet and securing strap

A heavy-duty 50mm stainless steel ratchet and polyester webbing strap is fitted to the oil barrel trolley. Once the trolley is positioned next to the barrel, simply adjust the strap length and tighten securely around the container. This design maximises contact between the rubber pads and the barrel mover offering a safe and secure system.

### Balanced load

### Balanced load

When you move the plastic barrel trolley into the deployed position, the wheels move beneath the barrel. By positioning the centre of gravity (CoG) directly over the wheels, the force required to move a barrel is significantly reduced when compared to a traditional sack truck. This innovative design feature was pioneered by us in 1999 and continues to be popular around the world.

### Stainless-steel construction

### Stainless-steel construction

All our barrel handling trolleys are manufactured from corrosion-resistant stainless steel (304-grade). Throughout the industry, our trolleys are subjected to very harsh environments and high levels of use. By using only the finest materials and manufacturing techniques, we ensure each trolley outperforms and outlasts all other barrel trolleys on the market.

### Chemical-resistant wheels

### Chemical-resistant wheels

Our Barrel Handling Trolley is designed for moving HDPE barrels weighing up to 350kg on flat level ground. We supply the trolley with high-quality elasticated rubber wheels which last many years of continuous usage. Precision bearings are fitted to the wheels, offering low rolling resistance. This makes the unit easy to operate on a variety of hard floor surfaces.

### Drum suitability

### Drum suitability

This barrel mover can handle a wide range of barrel types including high-density polyethylene (HDPE) food containers with screw top lids. These barrels are known to contain foods such as olives and pickles and are often difficult to handle, predominantly due to their unusual lid type. For a breakdown of the barrels with which this product is compatible, please see the suitability document below. If the barrels you use aren’t in the document, contact us and we'll give you guidance.

##### Product Application

The wheel assembly for STS (Ship-to-Shore) container terminals has a specific application in the maritime industry. The wheel assembly is an integral part of the gantry crane system used in container terminals to handle shipping containers. Here are the key applications of the wheel assembly:

Movement of Gantry Cranes: The Port crane spare parts replacement enables the smooth movement of gantry cranes along the rail tracks that are installed at the container terminal. This allows the gantry cranes to traverse the length of the terminal and position themselves for loading or unloading containers from ships.

Weight Distribution and Load Bearing: The wheel assembly bears the weight of the gantry crane and the containers it lifts. It is designed to distribute the load evenly across the wheels, ensuring stability and safe operations during crane movement.

Precision Positioning: The overhead crane trolley wheel Assembly plays a crucial role in positioning the gantry crane accurately for container handling operations. It allows the crane to move horizontally along the rail tracks with precision, aligning it with the designated container stacks on the terminal.

Durability and Reliability: The wheel assembly is designed to withstand heavy loads, harsh operating conditions, and frequent movements. It must have excellent durability and reliability to ensure smooth and uninterrupted operations in the container terminal.

Maintenance and Replacement: The wheel assembly requires regular inspection, maintenance, and, if necessary, replacement to ensure its optimal performance. This involves checking for wear and tear, lubricating the wheels, and replacing any damaged components to maintain the overall efficiency and safety of the gantry crane system.

In summary, the wheel assembly in STS container terminals is essential for the movement, stability, and precision positioning of gantry cranes during container handling operations.

# Belt Conveyors

Belt conveyors are essential equipment that enable the efficient and uninterrupted transportation of bulk materials from one point to another in a wide range of applications, from crushing and screening plants to mining, industrial production to logistics. At STS Global Machinery, we design and manufacture the most suitable, durable, and high-performance conveyor solutions based on your project's capacity, distance, and material specifications.

## Working Principle: Simple and Effective Transport

The operating principle of belt conveyors is quite simple. They consist of an endless belt made of rubber or a similar flexible material stretched between two drums (pulleys):

- Tensioning System: It prevents slipping and ensures efficient power transfer by ensuring the belt operates at optimum tension.
- Return Rolls: It carries the lower and empty arm of the belt and ensures its return to the system.
- Carrier Rollers: It supports the upper arm of the belt between two drums and helps transport the material without spilling.
- Tail Drum: It is located at the other end of the belt and ensures the return of the belt.
- Drive Drum: This drum, rotated by a motor and reducer, gives movement to the belt.
- Contact

Material is loaded onto the belt at one end of the conveyor (usually the tail end) and discharged at the other end (the head end) by traveling across the moving belt surface.

## Design and Structural Features

Our conveyors are manufactured in different structural designs to offer the best solution for your project requirements and budget:

- Stock Conveyors: Special conveyor solutions are offered for stocking materials in facilities, which can be designed as mobile or fixed, depending on the request.
- Tensioning Systems: On short and medium distance conveyors (up to approximately 40 meters) screw tensioning system automatically maintains optimum belt tension on longer lines when in use weighted tensioning systems preferred.
- Bandwidths: Production is carried out in different belt widths from 500 mm to 1200 mm, in accordance with the capacity and size of the material to be transported.
- Chassis Structure: The main frame of the conveyor is heavy duty type From NPU profile or a more economical solution from twisted sheet metal can be manufactured.

Product details

### RS PRO Rectangular Proximity Reed Switches

RS PRO range of rectangular magnetic proximity reed switches which provide a simple and cost-effective solution to position or limit sensing applications. Reed switches are often employed to carry out such functions as linear actuator switches, security system switches and door switches.Options include: 811-0748- Proximity Switch - Reed based changeover contacts 811-0736- Proximity Switch - Normally Open Contacts 811-0745- Rectangular Encapsulated MagnetReed switches are a type of industrial switch and are used to interrupt or redirect the flow of electricity within a circuit. Reed switches are composed of two ferrous reeds in a small glass casing. The switches are magnetised and move when the magnetic field is moved towards the switch. A reed switch can turn on or off when a magnetic field is nearby.RS PRO have a great range of industrial magnetic proximity switches and magnetic proximity sensors to suit many different applications.

### Features and Benefits:

Moulded switch case with 2 slotted fixing holesRobust sealed switch

### Typical Applications:

Reed Proximity Switches and Proximity Sensors (also known as magnetic sensors) are popular due to their reliability and simple design. Magnetic proximity switches are a type of electromagnetic switch which controls the flow of electricity within a circuit. Magnetic proximity switches can be used in the following applications:Position sensingLinear actuatorsSecurity switchingDoor Switch

FAQsWhat is a magnetic proximity switch?Magnetic proximity switches are a type of electromagnetic switch which controls the flow of electricity within a circuit.What is the difference between a proximity switch and a proximity sensor?A proximity sensor is a sensor which is able to detect the presence of nearby objects without any physical contact. Proximity switches open or close an electrical circuit when they make contact with or come within a certain distance of an object. Why RS PRO?RS PRO is our own brand range and brings you a wide range of high-quality, great value products offering you more choice. Trusted by engineers all over the world, every part of every RS PRO product has been rigorously tested against demanding industry standards; theyre only given the RS PRO seal of approval if were confident of their exceptional quality, which means you can be confident too.

### Product Description

## 20A 230-440V Rotary Selector Switch 3 Position Distribution Cabinet Installation

## Product Description

UKT Series Universal changeover switch mainly used for AC 50Hz, rated voltage up to 440V and below, DC voltage up to 220V, rated current to 100A electrical circuit for manually infrequent making or breaking the circuit for the purposes of control and conversion ,can also controlling three-phase asynchronous motors and circuit directly as the purposes of master control and measurement. The products widely used, can be used as the circuit control switch, measuring equipment switches, motor control switches and the master control switch, and welding machine switch and so on. Compliance with standards: The changeover switch use to the main circuit switching and direct control comply with IEC/EN60947 The transfer switch for main control complies with IEC/EN60947

Operating application

① Motor star-delta starting,communication or no commutation,with or without contactor interlock circuit.

② Control of stepping,suitable for any loads,with or without “O”position.

③ Power supply switching or load switching.

④ Starting of AC motor(for single-phase power supply with capacitor)

⑤ Motor(multi-tap winding)rev switching,speed of rotation for2,3 or 4 steps,commutation or no commutation.

⑥ Ammeter or voltmeter switching among three-phase circuits.

Product Feature

1. The switch can be reliably applied to lighting equipment, heating equipment and motor, and can also directly switch the motor (AC-3) to ensure the reliability of frequent on-off operation.

2. It can be used as a maintenance switch or a main switch connected with various electrical loads and equipped with a shell. It can be padlocked at the opening part to ensure the circuit misoperation and power on accident. The opening part is clearly visible and cannot be reset automatically. The product meets the standard of gb14048.3/iec60947-3.

3. There are three installation methods: A, flush installation (front fixed), B, rear installation (rear fixed, with door linkage or cover linkage), C, surface installation (with insulating waterproof shell).

## Application

The principle applications of Cam Operated Rotary Switches are for making, breaking and isolation of power circuits and switching the circuits. Cam switches are suitable for AC as well as DC application used for virtually all purposes. Such as motor control, panel meter switching, control and distribution panel, etc.

### Eaton Stay-Put Action Selector Switch

Eaton's stay-put action range of selector switches, sometimes be referred to as a rotary selector or function selector switch, from the RMQ16 series are designed to simplify the process of buying individual components. Available in various colour rotary knobs with either momentary or maintained switching in 2 or 3 positions options these selector switches make it easy to select the right switch type for your automation and control needs. Ideally suited for industrial applications the front elements have an enhanced IP65 protection rating making them dust tight and protected against water projection.These selector devices can be butted together allowing a greater number of devices to be fitted into a smaller area compared to 22.5 mm devices. One or two normally open or normally closed contacts, which are available separately in this range, can be fitted to each switch. The colour coded contacts 230V/4A, having low current voltage switching offer a life expectancy of three million operations while the emergency-stop buttons also offer important features such as tamper-proofing.

### Features and Benefits

 Mechanical lifespan of over 1,000,000 operations IP65 rating, offering protection against solids, such as dust, and liquids Operating temperature range of -25°C to +60°C Single selector switch units Available in 18 and 25mm square bezel sizes Standard fixing aperture of 16mm

### Uses and Applications

 Dangerous equipment such as motors that require human intervention to operate. Public buildings to control lighting in restrooms, corridors etc.

### Eaton 3 Position Selector Switch - Q18WK3R

This 3 position, maintained selector switch has a white thumb-grip allowing you to select the appropriate function with comfort and ease.• Front-mounted or front panel mount changeover switch• Maintained• White thumbgrip with VS anti rotation tab• 3 position switch• 18mm square bezel Note Eaton formerly known as Moeller

### Eaton RMQ 16mm Range

A range of control devices with an IP65 protection rating and conforming to IEC 947-5-1. The standard fixing aperture is 16mm. Behind panel depth (including terminals) is only 49mm. The devices can be butted together allowing a greater number of devices to be fitted into a smaller area compared to 22.5mm devices. One or two normally open or normally closed contacts, which are available separately in this range, can be fitted to each switch. Colour coded contacts 230V/4A, having low current voltage switching with a life expectancy of three million operations.

Product Specifications --

The MGB family consists of Small Form Factor Pluggable (SFP) transceiver modules that are specifically designed for high performance integrated duplex data link over single mode optical fiber. These transceiver modules are compliant with the SFP Multisource Agreement (MSA) and hot pluggable. These modules offer an easy way to be installed in SFP MSA compliant ports at any time without the interruption of the host equipment operation.

The SFP transceivers are hot-pluggable and hot-swappable. You can plug and unplug the transceivers to/from any SFP port without powering down the Switch/Media Converter.

| MGB-LX |
| --- |
| PHY Type | IEEE 802.3z 1000BASE-LX |
| Fiber Type | Single-Mode |
| Connector | Dual LC/UPC |
| DDM | YES |
| Wavelength | 1310nm |
| Maximum Distance | 10 km |
| Operating Temperature | 0~60 degrees C |

## General Information for Planet SFP Transceiver Modules

## PLANET SFP 1000B-LX 20km LC SM. SFP transceiver type: Fiber optic, Maximum data transfer rate: 1000 Mbit/s, Interface type: SFP. Product colour: Metallic

## SFP 1000B-LX 20km LC SM

The MGB family consists of Small Form Factor Pluggable (SFP) transceiver modules that are specifically designed for high performance integrated duplex data link over single mode optical fiber. These transceiver modules are compliant with the SFP Multisource Agreement (MSA) and hot pluggable. These modules offer an easy way to be installed in SFP MSA compliant ports at any time without the interruption of the host equipment operation.The MGB family of SFP Mini-GBIC Gigabit Ethernet modules can be installed in PLANET Switch products with SFP mini-GBIC interface. The deployment distance can be extended from 100 meters (TP) to 550 meters (Multi-mode, LC), and up to 120 kilometers (Single-mode, LC).To meet the increasing demand of the Industrial Ethernet fiber solution, Planet releases the MGB-T series 1000BASE-SX/LX/BX transceivers that can operate reliably in electrically harsh, climatically demanding, and wide temperature range (-40 to 85) environment. The MGB-T series 1000BASE-SX/LX/BX transceivers provide easy and fast 1000BASE-SX/LX/BX connection for Planet wide temperature industrial equipment. #### Product Details | PLATE SPACER

5365-01-614-2388 A flat metal or plastic item of various peripheral shapes having a solid (not laminated) cross-section. It is designed to maintain a predetermined distance between two surfaces. For round items without a hole having a solid rectangular cross-section use DISK, SOLID, PLAIN. For round or hexagonal items with only one hole centrally located and with the length (thickness) exceeding 25 percent of the outside diameter or distance across peripheral flats, see SPACER, SLEEVE. The thickness between the two parallel bearing surfaces must be 0.006 inch, (0.152 mm) or more for items less than 1/4 inch (6.35 mm) across the peripheral diameter, or smallest overall outside dimension, or must be 0.016 inch (0.406 mm) or more for items 1/4 inch (6.35 mm) or greater across the peripheral diameter or smallest overall outside dimension. For items with a thickness less than those indicated above, see SHIM. For items with one hole centrally located conforming to the above dimensional criteria use WASHER, FLAT or SPACER, RING as applicable. When thickness and/or outside diameter or smallest overall outside dimension is designated as a tolerance/dimension the maximum dimension will be used to determine compliance. Excludes GASKET; INSULATOR (as modified) and MOUNTING PAD, ELECTRICAL-ELECTRONIC COMPONENT.202259000005365000000

# SLA Spreader Linear Actuator

The Comprehensive Solution for Port Applications The SLA - Spreader Linear Actuator from Pfaff-silberblau is specially designed for use in port cranes and container handling systems. With its high load capacity, precise positioning, and robust construction, it contributes significantly to the efficiency and safety of port logistics.

## Need Assistance?

Not sure if this is the right product for your application, or need a custom solution? Contact us today for help from an expert.

Features & Benefits

## Features & Benefits

Precision and Control: Our Pfaff lifting gears offer extremely precise load control, which is essential for the safe and efficient movement and positioning of containers.

Maintainability: Mechanical lifting gears do not require hydraulic fluids or compressed air systems, simplifying maintenance and minimizing the risk of leaks. This results in greater reliability and lower operating costs. SLA linear actuators also benefit from low maintenance because they have fewer moving parts and do not use hydraulic fluids.

Energy Efficiency: Pfaff lifting gears and SLA linear actuators are characterized by high energy efficiency because they do not require a continuous power supply. This reduces operating costs and contributes to more sustainable resource use.

Environmental friendliness: Without hydraulic fluids, there is no risk of environmental pollution from leaks. This makes our screw jacks and linear actuators an environmentally friendly solution for port applications.

Corrosion resistance: In coastal ports where the air is salty and humid, our Pfaff screw jacks with C5 paint, special spindle protection, and rust-proof components offer excellent corrosion protection.

Temperature resistance: Our screw jacks are equipped with heating and temperature monitoring to withstand extreme temperature differences. This prevents lubricants from becoming too viscous in cold conditions and enables early detection and correction of potential problems, increasing operational reliability and reducing unplanned downtime.

High reliability and customized design: SLA linear actuators offer an electromechanical solution with high reliability and can be customized to the specific requirements of your application. This ensures optimal performance and efficiency, regardless of the unique challenges of your environment.

Challenges in Port Operations

- Continuous operation places high demands on reliability and ease of maintenance.
- Constant weather conditions require a corrosion-resistant design.
- Heavy loads must be moved quickly and safely.

The SLA Spreader Linear Actuator masters all of these challenges and ensures precise linear movements in crane systems – whether lifting, lowering, or positioning containers and loads.

Typical Applications in Port Cranes

- Safety mechanisms – Reliable end-position monitoring and integrated braking systems for maximum operational safety.
- Spreader tilt correction – Automatic adjustment for even load distribution.
- Height adjustment of crane beams – Flexible adaptation to different container sizes.
- Spreader drives for container cranes – Precise positioning of the grab for picking up and depositing containers.

Technical highlights for port operations

- Low maintenance – Long service life thanks to high-quality lubrication and robust mechanics.
- Energy-efficient IE3 three-phase motors – Reduced power consumption with high performance.
- Precise control via absolute encoders – No homing required.
- IP66 protection class – Complete protection against dust and water.
- Weatherproof coating (C4, 240 μm, RAL5015) – Protection against salt water and corrosion.
- Load capacity up to 150 kN – Ideal for heavy-duty applications.

Your advantage – Maximum efficiency in port operations by using the SLA - Spreader Linear Actuator in your harbor cranes, you benefit from higher handling capacity, reduced downtime, and overall increased operating efficiency.
